description: Create a content slide with a two-column layout: a left horizontal multi-series bar chart comparing planned nonfinancial risk management enhancements across 2025, 2024, and 2023, plus a right sidebar callout with the key takeaway.

header.headline: Figure 5: What key enhancements is your organization planning to make to its nonfinancial risk management capabilities over the next 12 months as part of BAU risk management?

items.text: Risk technology is the top planned enhancement in 2025 at 58%, up from 32% in 2024 and 42% in 2023.
Controls/control framework remains a leading priority at 53% in 2025, versus 53% in 2024 and 55% in 2023.
Governance, frameworks and policies, and talent development each stand at 47% in 2025.
